name: MAZINGER ZERO Sentient (Scary Boyfriend..)
description:
WARNING: this Mazinger zero isnt evil. But this is a reference of how HE CAN BE PLAYABLE IN Super Robot Wars V.

Ahem..? how the hell Am i trying to make the scariest mech ever? to be this?? a sentient?? Well..... this is probably a request from Romino..... so yeah... so.. This is a sentient version scary Boyfriend energy....
creator: Elenkaiser G
